positive: A whimsical and ethereal scene featuring a minimalist, stylized woodland animal silhouette (like a fox or deer) among elegant floral and botanical motifs. The style should be modern, hand-drawn ink illustration meets deep forest mystery, executed with thick, clean linework and strong, graphic contrast. Composition must be centrally focused and highly symmetrical, suitable for a chest-area print on apparel. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette: deep indigo, forest green, cream, and gold accents. The overall mood is dreamy, artistic, and nostalgic. Focus on clean, solid areas of negative space and crisp outlines for optimal printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, signature, watermark, text, logo, messy lines, smudges, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, poor contrast, realism, photorealism
